//PURPOSE: REVERSE pipeline source: tail the Atlas change stream so the
//PURPOSE2: self-managed target can be kept current for fail-back after cutover.
//NOTE: No copy.existing: the target was already seeded before cutover; rollback
//NOTE2: only needs the CHANGES applied to Atlas from the cutover point onward.
name: rollback-source-atlas

config.//scope: Restrict the change stream to the migrated databases.
config.//topics: Distinct prefix from the forward pipeline (cdc) to avoid any topic clash.
config.offset.partition.name: rollback-atlas
config.mongo.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: dlq.rollback.source
